description: MD-ADSS Sample Cybersecurity Dataset — Multi-attack scenario demo

brute_force.description: Automated brute-force login attack against admin account

events.raw_text: AUTH FAILURE user=admin src=185.220.101.1 host=SRV-DC-01 tool=Hydra
AUTH FAILURE user=admin src=185.220.101.1 host=SRV-DC-01 tool=Hydra

expected_nova_lite_output.explanation: Automated brute-force attack using Hydra from 185.220.101.1 with 150+ attempts in the last hour targeting admin account on domain controller SRV-DC-01.

expected_nova_act_output.reasoning: High-confidence brute force attack. IP 185.220.101.1 identified as Tor exit node with malicious reputation. Immediate IP block and credential reset required.
execution_steps: 2. Force password reset for admin account
3. Review all login logs for successful authentication from this IP

ransomware.description: Active ransomware infection with C2 communication

events.raw_text: ENDPOINT WS-FINANCE-01 ENCRYPT Q1_Budget.xlsx.encrypted proc=svchost_update.exe CPU=95%
NETWORK 10.0.1.45 -> C2 beacon to beacon.darkops.io interval=60s

expected_nova_lite_output.explanation: Active ransomware infection confirmed on WS-FINANCE-01. 127 files encrypted by suspicious process svchost_update.exe with C2 communication to beacon.darkops.io (91.219.237.229). Immediate containment required.

expected_nova_act_output.reasoning: CRITICAL: Active ransomware confirmed. Immediate isolation of WS-FINANCE-01 required to prevent lateral spread to financial systems. C2 channel to 91.219.237.229 must be severed.
execution_steps: 2. Block C2 IP 91.219.237.229 at all firewalls
4. Scan adjacent hosts 10.0.1.x for similar activity
5. Activate backup recovery procedures for finance data

payload.subject: Urgent: Your account has been compromised

events.raw_text: EMAIL from=security@amaz0n-security.com to=admin@company.com subject='Urgent: Your account has been compromised'

expected_nova_lite_output.explanation: High-confidence phishing email detected. Domain amaz0n-security.com is a typosquatted Amazon domain. All email authentication checks failed (SPF, DKIM, DMARC). Executable attachment Security_Update.exe present. Subject line creates false urgency.

expected_nova_act_output.reasoning: Targeted spear-phishing with executable attachment. Email has failed all authentication checks. Quarantine entire email thread, block sender domain, and notify admin.
execution_steps: 1. Quarantine email and attachments across all mailboxes
2. Block domain amaz0n-security.com at email gateway
4. Check if attachment was executed on any endpoint
5. Search for similar emails from same IP range
6. Add IOCs to threat intelligence feeds

normal_baseline.description: Normal activity baseline for anomaly comparison

events.raw_text: AUTH SUCCESS user=jdoe src=10.0.1.22 host=WS-DEV-03 method=mfa
